heading: Reimbursements
label: 3731 Reimbursements
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (h), was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Panama Canal Act of 1979, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–7093 Stat. 452section 3601 of this titleSept. 27, 1979

Amendments1998—Subsec. (e). struck out subsec. (e) which provided that appropriations or funds of the Commission or of any other department or agency of the United States conducting operations in the Republic of Panama were available to defray the cost of certain health care services and educational services.Pub. L. 105–2611997—Subsec. (c)(1). , substituted “” for “the effective date of this Act”.Pub. L. 105–85, § 3550(d)(2)(A)October 1, 1979Subsec. (c)(2). , substituted “” for “such effective date”.Pub. L. 105–85, § 3550(d)(2)(B)October 1, 1979Subsec. (e)(2). , substituted “, to other Commission employees when determined by the Commission to be necessary for their recruitment or retention, and to other persons” for “and persons”.Pub. L. 105–85, § 3525(b)1996—Subsec. (d). struck out “appropriations or” before “funds of the Commission” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 104–106Subsec. (e). inserted concluding provisions “Notwithstanding the provisions relating to the availability of adequate schools contained in , the Commission shall by regulation determine the extent to which costs of educational services may be defrayed under this subsection.”Pub. L. 104–201section 5924(4)(A) of title 51994—Subsec. (e)(2). inserted “or the United States” after “schools in the Republic of Panama”.Pub. L. 103–3371992—Subsec. (e)(1). inserted “provided by medical facilities licensed and approved by the Republic of Panama (and not operated by the United States)” after “health care services”.Pub. L. 102–4841988—Subsec. (h). added subsec. (h).Pub. L. 100–7051985—Subsec. (e). amended subsec. (e) generally, striking out “, in accordance with subsection (d) of this section,” after “shall be available” in provisions preceding par. (1) and inserting “employees of the Commission who are citizens of the United States and” in par. (2).Pub. L. 99–223

children.heading: Reimbursement of the Employees’ Compensation Fund, Bureau of Employees’ Compensation, Department of Labor, and other Government departments and agencies by Commission
children.label: a Reimbursement of the Employees’ Compensation Fund, Bureau of Employees’ Compensation, Department of Labor, and other Government departments and agencies by Commission
children.text: The Commission shall reimburse the Employees’ Compensation Fund, Bureau of Employee’s Compensation, Department of Labor, for the benefit payments to the Commission’s employees, and shall also reimburse other Government departments and agencies for payments of a similar nature made on its behalf.

children.heading: Reimbursement of Commission by Department of Defense
children.label: b Reimbursement of Commission by Department of Defense
children.text: The Department of Defense shall reimburse the Commission for amounts expended by the Commission in maintaining defense facilities in standby condition for the Department of Defense.

children.heading: Designation of funds of Department of Defense or any other department or agency of United States to carry out purposes of this subsection
children.label: c Designation of funds of Department of Defense or any other department or agency of United States to carry out purposes of this subsection

children.text: conducting the educational and health care activities, including kindergartens and college, carried out by the Canal Zone Government and the Panama Canal Company before , andOctober 1, 1979
providing the services related thereto to the categories of persons to which such services were provided before .October 1, 1979

children.heading: Reimbursement to departments or agencies furnishing services
children.label: d Reimbursement to departments or agencies furnishing services

children.text: other persons authorized to receive such services who are eligible to receive them pursuant to the Panama Canal Treaty of 1977 and related agreements.

children.heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 105–261, div. C, title XXXV, § 3507(a)112 Stat. 2269Oct. 17, 1998
children.label: e Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 105–261, div. C, title XXXV, § 3507(a)112 Stat. 2269Oct. 17, 1998

children.heading: Reimbursement of United States by Republic of Panama for salaries and other employment costs
children.label: f Reimbursement of United States by Republic of Panama for salaries and other employment costs
children.text: For purposes of the reimbursement of the United States by the Republic of Panama for the salaries and other employment costs of employees of the Commission who are assigned to assist the Republic of Panama in the operation of activities which are transferred to that Government as a result of any provision of the Panama Canal Treaty of 1977 and related agreements, which reimbursement is provided for in paragraph 8 of Article 10 of that Treaty, the Commission shall be deemed to be the United States of America.

children.heading: Operation of Canal Zone College
children.label: g Operation of Canal Zone College
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President, through the appropriate department or agency of the United States, shall, until , operate the educational institution known as the “Canal Zone College”. Such institution shall continue to provide, insofar as practicable, the level of services which it offered immediately before .January 1, 2000October 1, 1979

children.heading: Prohibition of funds for uses other than Commission activities
children.label: h Prohibition of funds for uses other than Commission activities
children.text: Except as expressly provided in this chapter, funds available to the Panama Canal Commission may not be made available to any other agency as that term is defined in , nor may funds be authorized or appropriated for any function other than Panama Canal Commission activities.section 551 of title 5
